headline: SK Hynix +12% on Micron earnings blowout
detail: Micron reported blockbuster results confirming AI-driven chip demand is accelerating. This is direct positive read-through for AVGO and SMH, your two largest chip exposures. Watch for a sympathy rally today — that's your best near-term window to trim AVGO at a less painful price.

headline: Anthropic building new AI data centers
detail: Continued hyperscaler AI infrastructure buildout is the secular tailwind behind PLTR, AVGO, and CRWD. It doesn't fix your current losses but confirms the underlying demand thesis isn't broken. Don't let a good macro story talk you out of respecting your stops.

headline: Iran warns ships over Strait of Hormuz transit
detail: A flare-up here would spike oil prices and rattle risk appetite broadly, hitting tech and growth names hardest — exactly your book. Oil prices are currently easing as tanker traffic resumes, so the acute risk is reduced for now, but this is a live geopolitical wire worth monitoring.

headline: Tesla and Waymo robotaxi race intensifies
detail: Autonomous vehicle competition is heating up with significant capital being deployed by players who build no cars. This is background noise for your holdings today but relevant if you're watching PLTR for any defense or autonomous-adjacent contract news.
